author: Maksim Markov
description: A spaced repetition plugin that helps you remember your notes by scheduling them for review at the right time. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: qoonmax
manifest.description: Create flashcards and AI-generated tests from notes. Study with spaced repetition, active recall, quizzes, review scheduling, memory retention, OpenAI, and DeepSeek.
manifest.name: MemMaster Flashcards + AI Tests

name: MemMaster Flashcards + AI Tests

releases.author: qoonmax
releases.description:
### Fixes
- Fixed Obsidian/ESLint warnings related to unsafe calls and unsafe value access in the review scheduler.
- Removed deprecated `display()` calls when refreshing the settings tab.
- Improved tag extraction typing in the review list.
- Removed `!important` from the delete-test modal CSS by using more specific selectors.

releases.author: qoonmax
releases.description:
### This release improves AI test generation and test management.

### What's New

- Added optional automatic AI test generation on the first review of a flashcard.
- Added the ability to delete generated tests directly from the test review view.
- Improved AI generation logic so MemMaster avoids creating duplicate or near-duplicate tests for the same source card.
- AI test generation now creates only as many tests as are useful for the card, instead of forcing a fixed limit of up to 3.
- Added a demo video preview to the README.

### Improvements

- Existing generated test questions are now passed into the generation prompt, helping the model skip already-covered recall targets.
- If existing tests are already sufficient, MemMaster now shows a clear notice instead of treating an empty generation result as an error.
- Review buttons are temporarily disabled while a card rating is being submitted, preventing accidental duplicate submissions.
- Review list rendering now guards against stale async render results.

### Notes

Automatic test generation is disabled by default and can be enabled in the test settings.

releases.author: qoonmax
releases.description:
This release replaces the legacy stage-based review scheduler with FSRS, the Free Spaced Repetition Scheduler.

### What’s New

- Switched flashcards and generated tests to adaptive FSRS scheduling.
- Added four review ratings: Again, Hard, Good, and Easy.
- Added FSRS metadata for stability, difficulty, repetitions, lapses, and next review time.
- Added one-time migration for legacy review state. Existing stage-based items are reset into a fresh FSRS state.
- Updated generated tests to use FSRS scheduling.
- Added test review screenshots and refreshed README documentation.
- Added a command to clear MemMaster metadata from the current document.
- Improved Obsidian compatibility by using `window.setTimeout()` and `window.requestAnimationFrame()`.

### Notes

Short-term minute-based FSRS learning steps are disabled, so reviews are scheduled at day-level intervals. Existing legacy cards and tests will start fresh under FSRS after upgrading.

releases.author: qoonmax
releases.description:
This release adds MemMaster Cloud support and improves the review experience.

### What's new

- Added MemMaster Cloud connection support.
- Added anonymous cloud recovery keys, so cloud features can work without an account, email, or password.
- Added settings for creating, copying, and connecting an existing recovery key.
- Added due and completed card counters in the review tabs.
- Improved review list metadata and UI text consistency.
- Updated plugin metadata and description for marketplace compliance.
- Refined CSS for better maintainability and compatibility with Obsidian checks.

### Notes

MemMaster Cloud can be used to generate practice tests from review cards and support reminder-related cloud features. Your recovery key identifies the cloud connection for the current vault, so keep it private.

releases.author: qoonmax
releases.description:
This release improves how completed flashcards are handled and adds a dedicated Completed view.

### Highlights

- Added a **Completed** tab for mastered flashcards.
- Completed cards are now tracked with metadata instead of being fully cleared.
- Added an option to review completed cards again by clearing MemMaster metadata.
- Added a warning for long flashcard notes.
- Improved metadata handling, responsive layout, and English/Russian translations.

releases.author: qoonmax
releases.description:
This patch release addresses Obsidian community plugin review feedback and improves compatibility with newer Obsidian APIs.

Changes:
- Updated minimum supported Obsidian version to `1.7.2`
- Fixed Obsidian API compatibility warnings for popout windows
- Replaced direct DOM creation with Obsidian helper APIs
- Fixed an extra blank line being inserted before note content after review metadata is added
- Rebuilt plugin bundle for release `1.0.1`
